art_market.summary: The Korean art market continues its steady late-March trend with moderate activity. Digital trust initiatives like '20!2026 Art Seoul' report sustained interest as closing dates approach.
key_events: 20!2026 Art Seoul: Digital exhibit reports 15% increase in virtual foot traffic over the weekend.
Major Exhibitions: Strong weekend attendance noted for the Kim Yun-shin retrospective at Hoam Museum.
Upcoming: Preparations for April's Galleries Art Fair continue to drive market discourse.
art_market.outlook: Stable; continued interest in both digital and physical blue-chip shows.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed the weekend session with a focus on earnings outlook. Continued semiconductor strength provides a firm base for the week ahead.

key_indicators.KOSPI_Status: Steady at 5,781.2; holding firm heading into the new week.
key_indicators.Market_Sentiment: Resilient; focus shifting to upcoming Q1 earnings estimates.
key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Semiconductor cycle, anticipated earnings reports, stable foreign inflows.
key_indicators.Outlook: Positive consolidation; expecting a steady open on Monday.
